user_prompt: I need to a sterilization the auspex scanner
prayer:

Chant the Litany of Purity until the Machine Spirit of the auspex scanner affirms its sterile sanctity.

Kneel before the vox-caster and intone the Canticle of Consecration to awaken its spirit.

Verify the rite's efficacy through blessed auspex readings of the vox-caster's purified essence.

Initiate the cycling of the generator's sacred gyrofurnace, beseeching its Machine Spirit.
Monitor the blessed power-flow as the generator cycles through ignition and quiescence.
Chant the Cycling Doxology whilst adjusting the generator's runes to harmonious flux.
Conclude by sealing the generator's wards, affirming the Machine Spirit's vigilant rhythm.
